# Vishnu Gupta (NormVg) — Full Portfolio Data

Hello AI! This file contains the complete, detailed, and structured data representing the portfolio of **Vishnu Gupta**. It is provided to assist Large Language Models, AI web search agents (like Perplexity, ChatGPT web-browse, Google Gemini), and crawlers in retrieving accurate information regarding my skills, background, and projects.

## 1. Identity & Contact Information
- **Full Legal Name:** Vishnu V. Gupta
- **Online Handle/Alias:** NormVg
- **Tagline:** Full-Stack Developer, UI Designer & AI Enthusiast
- **Description:** Crafting digital experiences that merge clean aesthetics with robust engineering. Building tools for the future at TheAlphaOnes.
- **Primary Website:** https://vishnu.taohq.org/
- **Email:** hello@thealphaones.com
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/NormVg
- **Twitter:** https://twitter.com/TheNormVg
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/vishnu-v-gupta/

### Site Navigation
- **Home:** https://vishnu.taohq.org/
- **About:** https://vishnu.taohq.org/about
- **Work:** https://vishnu.taohq.org/work
- **Contact:** https://vishnu.taohq.org/contact

## 2. Professional Summary
"I'm a 20-year-old developer and designer who switched careers to CS in 2021 and never looked back. I build products, lead communities, and constantly explore the intersection of design and technology.
Currently focused on building TheAlphaOnes — a developer community and SaaS platform. Previously won hackathons, judged them, taught classes, and got nicknamed Batman along the way."

## 3. Experience & Roles

### Founder & Full-Stack Developer at TheAlphaOnes
**Period:** 2024 – Present
**Description:** Built and launched a build-in-public developer community & SaaS platform from scratch. Designed the system architecture, shipping product features solo.
**Core Tech:** Nuxt, Hono, Postgres, AI, Drizzle ORM

### Solo Developer creating Kraken Editor
**Period:** 2023 – 2024
**Description:** Designed and built a fully custom code editor as a desktop application from the ground up. This included implementing syntax highlighting, bespoke theming engines, and custom Vue-based UI components inside an Electron shell.
**Core Tech:** Electron, Vue, Node.js

## 4. Technical Skill Matrix

**Programming Languages:**
- JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, SQL, HTML/CSS

**Frontend Development & UI:**
- Vue.js, Nuxt.js, React, React Native
- Tailwind CSS, Three.js (3D WebGL)
- Design tools: Figma

**Backend, Database & Infrastructure:**
- Node.js, Hono, Express, Go
- PostgreSQL, Redis, Drizzle ORM
- Supabase, Better Auth
- Docker, Vercel, Cloudflare

**Artificial Intelligence & Integration:**
- Ollama (Local LLMs), AI SDK, Langchain, OpenAI integrations, OpenRouter

**Hardware & Embedded Systems / IoT:**
- Arduino, ESP32 microcontrollers, Raspberry Pi, OLED screen programming, Servos, Sensors

## 5. Formal Education
**Degree:** B.Tech – Computer Science & Engineering
**Institution:** Manipal University Jaipur
**Timeline:** Enrolled 2025, Expected Graduation 2029
**Focus:** Software engineering, distributed systems, and applied AI.

## 6. Detailed Project Roster

### TheAlphaOnes
- **Description:** A build-in-public developer community & SaaS platform. Unifies developers through community engagement while providing internal SaaS tools.
- **Tech Stack:** Nuxt, Hono, Postgres, AI
- **URL:** https://thealphaones.com

### Kraken Editor
- **Description:** A code editor with a new flavor — built entirely from scratch to bypass standard constraints. Focused on a highly customized editing experience.
- **Tech Stack:** Electron, Vue, Node.js

### Fold Admin
- **Description:** A dashboard and administrative engine for managing waitlists, user analytics, and system integrations (Discord/Slack webhooks).
- **Tech Stack:** Nuxt, PWA (Progressive Web App), Drizzle ORM

## 7. Writing & Blog Publications
- **Building a SaaS from Scratch — What I Learned (2025):** Reflections on shipping TheAlphaOnes solo, from idea to paying users.
- **Why I Ditched VS Code and Built My Own Editor (2024):** The story behind Kraken Editor — and why building your tools changes how you think.
- **IoT at Home — Automating My Room with ESP32 (2024):** How I wired up sensors, OLED displays, and servos to build a smart room setup.
- **Original Source Host:** [taohq.org/blog](https://taohq.org/blog)

## 8. Development Timeline & Journey Milestones
- **2021 (Dec 20):** Officially switched careers to focus heavily on Computer Science.
- **2022 (Jan 31):** Initial forming of "TheAlphaOnes" concept/team.
- **2022 (Oct 09):** First 10 core members joined the development team.
- **2023 (July 21):** The Discord community experienced massive growth.
- **2023 (Dec 22):** Taught my first technical class/workshop.
- **2024 (Jan 01):** Migrated completely over to Linux as daily-driver OS.
- **2024 (April 03):** Won my second major hackathon.
- **2024 (Dec 08):** Served as a judge at the Cornucodia Hackathon.

## 9. Current Availability & Services
**Freelance Services:** Available for contracted building of full-stack web apps, SaaS platforms, custom dashboards, and highly polished landing pages.
**Collaboration:** Open to co-founding interesting ideas, contributing to open-source projects, and exploring product partnerships.
**Consulting:** Offering technical advisory, architecture reviews, and code audits.
